# Issue 12 — `/workbook` Landing Page: Teacher-First Sales Page for My AI Adventure Workbook

**Author:** Antigravity Mock Sync
**Status:** In Progress
**Branch:** `feature/stories-redesign` (Aggregated)

## Overview
Create a dedicated `/workbook` route on avenircore.com that serves as the primary owned sales page for the **My AI Adventure Workbook**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New route `/workbook` resolves correctly in react-router-dom v7
- [ ] File created at `src/pages/WorkbookPage.jsx`
- [ ] Route added to `src/App.jsx`
- [ ] Page included in `vite-plugin-sitemap`
- [ ] OG image and meta tags populated via `react-helmet-async`
- [ ] JSON-LD Product schema injected and validated
- [ ] Cover image lazy-loaded with `loading="lazy"`
- [ ] CTA button is an `<a href>` to Gumroad 

---
*Note: Due to the missing `gh` CLI dependency, this issue is tracked logically inside the code repository itself to satisfy the Github sync requirements alongside standard AvenirCore issue-tracker patterns.*
